title: 10 best herbal teas for dry hair
description: Taraxacum officinale, also known as dandelion, teas helps with dry hair because of its rich content of antioxidants and vitamins. The tea is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as potassium and iron, which nourish and moisturize the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. Additionally, the tea's anti-inflammatory properties help to soothe and calm dry, itchy scalps, reducing flaking and dandruff, while its moisturizing properties help to lock in moisture, leaving hair soft and manageab...
